operations.summary: Run the full calibration pipeline (validate → detect → solve → report).

BrownConradyDistortion.description:
Brown-Conrady radial + tangential distortion coefficients.

Phase 1 supports 5 parameters only.  If k4/k5/k6 (rational model)
are needed, the validate stage will reject the input.
BrownConradyDistortion.title: BrownConradyDistortion

ImagesConfig.description: Where the captured image frames live.
ImagesConfig.title: ImagesConfig

LensEstimateConfig.description:
Quick Lens Estimate config (Level 2, Quick Lens Estimate spec §3.1).

Default ``enabled=False`` reproduces Phase-1 behaviour exactly (lens fully
fixed).  When enabled, the listed ``params`` become free variables in the
joint bundle adjustment, gated by the observability checks in
``qa/observability.py``.  The result is always a session-coupled, non-master
estimate carrying an identifiability warning.

max_spatial_rms_px_for_center.title: Max Spatial Rms Px For Center

max_spatial_rms_px_for_k.title: Max Spatial Rms Px For K

LensEstimateConfig.title: LensEstimateConfig

LensProfile.description:
Unified internal lens representation.

Computed properties ``fx``, ``fy``, ``cx``, ``cy`` derive the camera
intrinsic matrix values (in pixels) from the physical parameters.
LensProfile.title: LensProfile

MarkerMapConfig.description:
Path to a surveyed marker map (AR mode ground-truth source, plan Phase A).

Present ⇒ the detect stage routes to the physical ArUco/AprilTag detector
and marker 3D coordinates come from the map instead of a screen definition.
Mutually exclusive with ``screen``.
MarkerMapConfig.title: MarkerMapConfig

ProcessorCheckConfig.description:
LED-processor 1:1 canvas mapping verification (architecture §3.3a, W9.1).

Only enforced when the referenced screen declares a ``processor``
(:class:`vpcal.models.screen.ProcessorCanvas`) — a screen with no processor
is assumed direct-drive 1:1 (Phase-1 default), so sessions without one see
no behaviour change.  When a processor IS declared, ``validate_session``
requires either ``processor_verified=true`` (self-attested, e.g. verified
once out-of-band for a fixed installation) or a ``mapping_image`` that
passes :func:`vpcal.core.mapping_verify.verify_mapping_image`.
ProcessorCheckConfig.title: ProcessorCheckConfig

RigidPrior.description: A rigid-transform prior: translation (mm) + quaternion (w, x, y, z).
RigidPrior.title: RigidPrior

ScreenConfig.description: Path to the screen definition (JSON or OBJ).
ScreenConfig.title: ScreenConfig

TrackingConfig.description: Tracking data source + coordinate-system / frame-alignment policy.
TrackingConfig.title: TrackingConfig

ValidationConfig.description:
Held-out validation poses (remediation A4).

Frames listed in ``holdout_frames`` (or selected by ``holdout_ratio``,
evenly spaced over the sorted frame ids) are EXCLUDED from the solve; the
solved transform is then evaluated on them, giving an independent
``validation_rms_px`` — in-sample RMS only proves self-consistency, not
that the perspective is right.
ValidationConfig.title: ValidationConfig

CameraFromTracker.description: camera-from-tracker delta, with a flag for whether it was refined.
CameraFromTracker.title: CameraFromTracker

EstimatedLens.description:
Session-coupled quick lens estimate (Level 2, QLE spec §6.1).

Present only when ``solver.lens_estimate.enabled``.  ``is_master`` is always
False and ``session_coupled`` always True — this estimate must never be
treated as a master lens or reused across stages.
EstimatedLens.title: EstimatedLens

EstimatedLensParam.description: One estimated lens scalar with its observability verdict (QLE spec §6.1).
EstimatedLensParam.title: EstimatedLensParam

RigidTransform.description:
A solved rigid transform: translation (mm) + quaternion (w, x, y, z).

``matrix_4x4`` is the homogeneous form, included for direct consumption by
downstream tools (e.g. manual UE/nDisplay application).
RigidTransform.title: RigidTransform

operations.summary: Generate VP-QCP calibration patterns for an LED screen.
Create a screen definition JSON interactively or from parameters.
Import a screen definition from an OBJ mesh.
Generate a synthetic calibration dataset with known ground truth.
Sweep each error source and tabulate solver sensitivity (error budget).
Generate a QA report from a calibration result.
Compare two calibration results for drift (daily drift check).
Export calibrated tracking data as OpenTrackIO JSONL.
Export calibrated screen geometry + transforms for UE nDisplay.
Import a survey CSV into a marker map JSON (AR ground-truth source).
Geometric / degeneracy validation of a marker map.
Generate printable ArUco/AprilTag marker boards + survey CSV template.
Generate DIY calibration-cube face sheets + CAD-truth marker map.
Explicitly re-base a marker map's stage frame (e.g. --to-ground).
Generate / check the 1:1 LED-processor canvas mapping test pattern.
Overlay the reprojected marker truth on capture frames (AR acceptance).
Calibrate the video↔tracking delay from a swing-test capture.
Record a timestamped tracking stream from a live FreeD / OpenTrackIO source.
Capture a video stream via a backend (synthetic / uvc / ndi / decklink).
Closed-loop capture session: settle/burst state machine, live detect feedback, auto-assembled quick-run-ready session directory.
Pattern playback host lives in the Volo player window (guiding stub).
